description:
'''Digicore''' (originally known as '''draincore''') is a [[microgenre]] of [[hip-hop]] and [[electronic music]] that developed alongside [[hyperpop]] in the late 2010s to early 2020s. The genre is typically made up of artists that share stylistic similarities to [[Drain Gang]] and [[100 gecs]], rather than the "[[bubblegum bass]]" musicians signed to the label [[PC Music]]. Digicore would influence several microgenres such as [[glitchcore]], [[Jerk (music genre)|jerk]], [[sigilkore]] and [[HexD|hexd]].

Notable acts include [[Jane Remover]], [[D0llywood1]], [[Whethan]], [[Aldn]], [[Quinn (musician)|Quinn]], [[Glaive (musician)|Glaive]], [[Ericdoa]], [[Quannnic]], [[Midwxst]], [[Lucy Bedroque]] and [[Brakence]].
